description: Real capture (2026-07-09, SDK 0.3.206). Explicit run_in_background:true subagent that runs ~12s (Bash sleep inside). session_state_changed:idle fires at lead-turn end while the subagent is live; real completion arrives later. Guards the premature-idle suppression for background subagents on the new SDK, incl. background_tasks_changed snapshots.
